title: Devices with radiating systems proximate to conductive bodies
abstract: A device including a radiating system, the radiating system comprising: at least one radiation booster or radiating element; a ground plane layer; a radiofrequency system electrically connected to the at least one radiation booster or radiating element and comprising at least one matching network; and at least one external port electrically connected to the radiofrequency system; the ground plane layer having at least two connecting points; the radiating system further comprises at least two electrically conductive elements, each of the at least two electrically conductive elements comprising one or more components; first and second electrically conductive elements of the at least two electrically conductive elements being adapted to electrically connect first and second connecting points, respectively, of the at least two connecting points to an electrically conductive body of an apparatus at a distance from the ground plane layer, the distance being smaller than Î»/15, wherein Î» is a free-space wavelength at a lowest frequency of operation of the radiating system; and each electrically conductive element of the at least two electrically conductive elements is further adapted to induce electric currents in the ground plane layer that are in-phase with respect to at least some electric currents induced in the ground plane layer by the at least one radiation booster or radiating element.
claims:
Claims 1 . A device (5) including a radiating system, the radiating system comprising: at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ); a ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); a radiofrequency system electrically connected to the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ) and comprising at least one matching network (30,80); and at least one external port (32) electrically connected to the radiofrequency system; the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) having at least two connecting points (20- 22,201 -204); characterized in that: the radiating system further comprises at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ), each of the at least two electrically conductive elements comprising one or more components (25-29,41 ); first and second electrically conductive elements of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) being adapted to electrically connect first and second connecting points (20-22,201 -204), respectively, of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) to an electrically conductive body (50) of an apparatus at a distance from the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the distance being smaller than Î»/15, wherein Î» is a free-space wavelength at a lowest frequency of operation of the radiating system; and each electrically conductive element of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) is further adapted to induce electric currents in the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) that are in-phase with respect to at least some electric currents induced in the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) by the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ). 2. The device (5) of claim 1 , wherein the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ) comprises: a single radiation booster element (1 1 ,301 ); or two or three radiation booster elements (1 1 ,301 ) electrically connected. 3. The device (5) of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the radiating system further comprises a feeding system (34) that electrically connects the at least one external port (32) to the radiofrequency system. 4. The device (5) of any one of the preceding claims, wherein: the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) comprise at least three connecting 

 points (20-22,201 -204); the first of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) is at a first third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in a lengthwise dimension thereof, the second of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) is at a second third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in the lengthwise dimension thereof, and a third of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) is at a third third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in the lengthwise dimension thereof; and the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprise at least three electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ), a third of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) being adapted to electrically connect the third connecting point to the electrically conductive body (50). 5. The device (5) of claim 4, wherein: the first connecting point is at a first distance in a width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a second distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the first distance being between 1 /3 and 2/3 of a width of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the second distance being between 0 and 1 /6 of a length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); the second connecting point is at the first distance in the width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a third distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the third distance being between 5/12 and 7/12 of the length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); and the third connecting point is at the first distance in the width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a fourth distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the fourth distance being between 5/6 and 6/6 of the length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140). 6. The device (5) of claim 4, wherein: the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) comprise four or more connecting points (20-22,201 -204); and the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprise as many electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) as there are connecting points (20-22,201 -204) in the at least two connecting points (20- 22,201 -204), each of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) being adapted to electrically connect one of the four or more connecting points (20-22,201 -204) to the electrically conductive body (50). 7. The device (5) of any one of the preceding claims, wherein each of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprises one of: a switch, a capacitor, an 

 inductor, a resistor, a filter, a via, and a combination thereof. 8. The device (5) of any one of the preceding claims, wherein the device (5) is a wireless device; and the radiating system operates from 824 MHz to 960 MHz and/or from 1710 MHz to 2690 MHz. 9. A system comprising: the device (5) of any one of claims 1 -8; and the apparatus comprising the electrically conductive body (50). 10. A method comprising: providing a device (5) including a radiating system, the radiating system comprising: at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ); a ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); a radiofrequency system electrically connected to the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ) and comprising at least one matching network (30,80); and at least one external port (32) electrically connected to the radiofrequency system; providing the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) with at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204); and providing an apparatus, the apparatus comprising an electrically conductive body (50); characterized in that the method further comprises: providing at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ), each of the at least two electrically conductive elements comprising one or more components (25-29,41 ); and altering at least some electric currents on the surface of the electrically conductive body (50) by connecting the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) to the electrically conductive body (50) with the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ), the at least some electric currents being altered such that they are in-phase with respect to at least some electric currents induced in the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) by the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ); the device (5) being provided such that the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) is at a distance from the electrically conductive body (50), the distance being smaller than Î»/15, wherein Î» is a free-space wavelength at a lowest frequency of operation of the radiating system. 1 1 . The method of claim 10, wherein the step of connecting the ground plane layer 

 (15,100,130,140) to the electrically conductive body (50) with the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprises: connecting a first of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) to the electrically conductive body (50) with a first of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ), and a second of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) to the electrically conductive body (50) with a second of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ). 12. The method of claim 1 1 , wherein: the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) comprise at least three connecting points (20-22,201 -204); the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprise at least three electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ); and the step of connecting the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) to the electrically conductive body (50) with the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) further comprises: connecting a third of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) to the electrically conductive body (50) with a third of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ). 13. The method of claim 12, wherein the first connecting point is at a first third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in a lengthwise dimension thereof, the second connecting point is at a second third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in the lengthwise dimension thereof, and the third connecting point is at a third third of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) in the lengthwise dimension thereof. 14. The method of claim 13, wherein: the first connecting point is at a first distance in a width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a second distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the first distance being between 1/3 and 2/3 of a width of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the second distance being between 0 and 1 /6 of a length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); the second connecting point is at the first distance in the width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a third distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the third distance being between 5/12 and 7/12 of the length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); and the third connecting point is at the first distance in the width direction of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) and at a fourth distance in the lengthwise dimension of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), the fourth distance being between 5/6 and 6/6 of the 

 length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140). 15. The method of any one of claims 10-12, wherein: the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204) comprise four or more connecting points (20-22,201 -204); the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprise as many electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) as there are connecting points in the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 -204); and the step of connecting the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140) to the electrically conductive body (50) with the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) further comprises: connecting each connecting point of the at least two connecting points (20-22,201 - 204) to the electrically conductive body (50) with one of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ). 16. The method of any one of claims 10-15, wherein the at least one radiation booster or radiating element (1 1 ,301 ) comprises: a single radiation booster element (1 1 ,301 ); or two or three radiation booster elements (1 1 ,301 ) electrically connected. 17. The method of any one of claims 10-16, wherein the radiating system further comprises a feeding system (34) that electrically connects the at least one external port (32) to the radiofrequency system. 18. The method of any one of claims 10-17, wherein each of the at least two electrically conductive elements (25-29,41 ) comprises one of: a switch, a capacitor, an inductor, a resistor, a filter, a via, and a combination thereof. 19. The method of any one of claims 10-18, further comprising providing the at least one matching network (30,80) such that the radiating system operates from 824 MHz to 960 MHz and/or from 1710 MHz to 2690 MHz; and wherein the device (5) is a wireless device. 20. The device (5) of any one of claims 1 -8, the system of claim 9 or the method of any one of claims 10-19, wherein a width of the electrically conductive body (50) is greater than a width of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140), and a length of the electrically conductive body (50) is greater than a length of the ground plane layer (15,100,130,140); and wherein the apparatus is preferably one of: a smart TV, a refrigerator, a fridge, a washing machine, a drying machine, a gas-meter, a water-meter, an electricity-meter, a motor vehicle, a train, an airplane, a rocket, and a ship.
